title: Connor Murphy allegedly injected gold believing it gave him ‘special powers’ before Thailand death
summary_full: YouTuber Connor Murphy reportedly believed injecting gold offered special powers.  He died after fleeing police and entering a lake in Thailand.  Authorities are awaiting autopsy and toxicology results for clarity.  Unconfirmed claims suggest he painted his house gold and acted erratically.  Investigations into his death and alleged gold injections continue.
